programs.title: Secrets of the Furious Five
programs.desc: After defeating Tai Lung, Po the panda gains the title of Dragon Warrior.Master Shifu assigns the bear another task - to teach kung fu.Enthusiastic bunnies become new adepts of the eastern martial art.In addition to improving his technique, Po must instill in the children the philosophy of kung-fu and character traits such as courage, self-confidence and patience.To achieve the goal, he tells them stories from the past of great warriors - the Crane, the Viper, the Tigress, the Monkey and the Mantis... In the Polish language version, they lent their voices to characters including:Marcin Hycnar (Po) and Jan Peszek (Shifu).

programs.title: Sarah Bernhardt, la divine
programs.desc: The beginning of the 20th century.The outstanding French actress Sarah Bernhardt (Sandrine Kiberlain) is considered one of the most important artists of her time and has the status of an international star.Her admirers include Oscar Wilde, Alfons Mucha and Victor Hugo.Her talent and extraordinary charisma, as well as her courage and extravagant lifestyle are widely admired.The actress disrupted social norms and shocked her contemporaries with her unusual preferences and numerous love affairs.She was a declared opponent of anti-Semitism.Fate connected her most closely with the actor Lucien Guitry (Laurent Lafitte) and the painter Louise Abbéma (Amira Casar).Since her fateful fall on stage in 1905 in Rio de Janeiro, Divine Sarah has been struggling with terrible knee pain, which over the years has made it impossible for her to move.In order to be able to perform, after a decade, the actress makes a dramatic decision.Full of passion and inner strength, the artist will forever be remembered in the history of art and culture.

programs.title: A Carpenter Christmas Romance
programs.desc: Writer Andrea returns to her family farm in Wildwood just before the holidays.She begins an affair with her ex-boyfriend Seth, who was employed in the crew renovating the town after the recent fire.

programs.title: By sleeping with others
programs.desc: Lainey and Jake had only slept together once, but it was the first and most important time in their lives.But then the lovers parted ways.A few years later, they accidentally bump into each other...

programs.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver 13
programs.desc: Another season of a show full of irony and sarcasm, hosted by John Oliver.In each episode, the host summarizes the events from the world of politics from the last week.

programs.title: Focus
programs.desc: Nicky Spurgeon is a calculating fraud.The model's appearance and ability to keep cool make him a master criminal.He is able to win people over, but he does it to take advantage of them.One day, in a restaurant, he meets a fair-haired beauty, Jess Barrett, whose ambition is to pursue a criminal career.He becomes her mentor.Over time, they both realize that they have much more in common than the relationship of master and disciple.However, they live in a world where there is no place for love.Spurgeon ends this relationship.Three years pass.Nicky is in Buenos Aires, where he works for the owner of a car racing team, Rafael Garrigi.He meets his former lover here.Aware of her strengths, the femme fatale has one goal - to take revenge for the way she was once treated.
